examples: In spite of its common name, the peanut or groundnut is also a legume rather than a nut.
Today she is making leaves from a local vegetable which she will mix with pounded groundnut to make a stew.
The famed groundnut growing region is suffering a striking decrease in terms of both cultivation area and yield.
Most of the groundnut crop is processed into peanuts and sold on the international markets.
"Right now we are promoting groundnut growing, not only for food, but for income, " says Chapota.
